findings.description: Header typography and emphasis are not fully preserved.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the top title block uses bold uppercase text with 'FUNDING AUTHORIZATION', 'SFY 2016-2017', and 'AUTHORIZATION #1' grouped tightly and centered. In the HTML, the title is larger but lighter in weight, and the subtitle lines are spaced farther apart, reducing the visual distinction and hierarchy.

findings.description: Signature/date lines and labels are reformatted, reducing alignment fidelity.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the signature line, division label, and date are arranged on separate aligned baselines with the date label directly beneath the date. In the HTML, 'Division of Aging & Adult Services Date' appears on one line and the accepted-by/date fields are compressed into inline text, altering the original form-like formatting.

findings.description: Table data mismatch: the Adult Day Care Fund row is missing the Federal Funds placeholder shown in the PDF.
findings.evidence: PDF table row for 'Adult Day Care Fund (93.667)' shows State Funds '$-', County Funds '$-', Total Funds '$-' and the Federal Funds cell appears present as a blank/placeholder cell within the table structure. HTML renders this row as '$-$-$-' after the program name, which preserves blankness but may not faithfully represent the visible placeholder formatting used elsewhere.

findings.description: Minor text formatting/spacing differences in headings and signature/date lines.
findings.evidence: PDF heading shows 'SFY 2016- 2017' and signature/date presented on separate aligned lines with underlines. HTML uses heading tags and converts the signature/date block to text with underscores and line breaks: '____________________________________________ August 31, 2016' and 'Division of Aging & Adult Services Date'.
